{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Invested protections
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Invested protections]] are small bronze shields attached to spectator sections.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|They were in the process of attaching small bronze shields to the outside of each section, facing the arena. “What are those?” Jerri whispered to him. “Invested protections,” Calder whispered back.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
